tasks.task_goal: Serve 4 bowls of chicken soup from a stockpot
tasks.expected_outcome: Four bowls are filled evenly with soup without spilling

tasks.task_goal: Portion 8 scoops of ice cream into waffle cones at a birthday party
tasks.expected_outcome: Each cone receives a rounded serving that releases cleanly from the tool
required_tool_attributes: sharpened leading edge to cut into frozen dessert

tasks.task_goal: Remove clumped waste from a cat's litter tray into a trash bag
tasks.expected_outcome: Clumps are lifted and separated while clean litter falls back into the tray
required_tool_attributes: tapered front edge to slide under clumps

tasks.task_goal: Fill a sandcastle bucket with damp beach sand
tasks.expected_outcome: Bucket is packed with sufficient sand for molding
required_tool_attributes: wide concave blade with raised sides

tasks.task_goal: Transfer 2 cups of flour from a paper bag to a mixing bowl
tasks.expected_outcome: Accurate flour quantity is moved without tearing the bag or spilling

tasks.task_goal: Skim floating leaves from a backyard koi pond into a yard waste bin
tasks.expected_outcome: Pond surface is cleared of leaves while water drains back into the pond
required_tool_attributes: deep mesh pocket forming a concave container

tasks.task_goal: Bail rainwater out of a canoe after a storm
tasks.expected_outcome: Water level is reduced enough for safe paddling
required_tool_attributes: large hollow cavity for volume support

tasks.task_goal: Load 30 grams of coffee beans from a storage jar into a grinder
tasks.expected_outcome: Correct bean amount is placed in the grinder hopper without spillage

tasks.task_goal: Collect a pile of sawdust from under a table saw into a trash bin
tasks.expected_outcome: Workbench area is cleared of loose sawdust
required_tool_attributes: wide front lip that sits flush to the floor

tasks.task_goal: Transfer granular lawn fertilizer from a bag into a broadcast spreader
tasks.expected_outcome: Spreader hopper is filled without spilling granules onto the lawn
required_tool_attributes: tapered mouth for easier entry into the bag

tasks.task_goal: Fill six seedling pots with potting mix from a large sack
tasks.expected_outcome: Pots are evenly filled and ready for planting
required_tool_attributes: curved cupped blade with high sides
pointed tip to penetrate compacted mix

tasks.task_goal: Serve steamed rice from a cooker into four plates
tasks.expected_outcome: Neat portions of rice are placed on each plate without sticking

tasks.task_goal: Move rock salt from a storage bucket to a handheld spreader for de-icing steps
tasks.expected_outcome: Spreader is loaded without contaminating or spilling salt

tasks.task_goal: Add aquarium gravel from a bag into a new fish tank
tasks.expected_outcome: Gravel is deposited evenly without scratching the glass

tasks.task_goal: Remove cooled ash from a wood stove into a metal ash bucket
tasks.expected_outcome: Firebox is cleared and ash is securely contained in the bucket
required_tool_attributes: shallow wide metal scoop with raised sides

tasks.task_goal: Portion muffin batter evenly into a 12-cup tin
tasks.expected_outcome: Each cup is filled to the same level with minimal drips

tasks.task_goal: Clear a path on a deck by moving drifted powdery snow into a pile
tasks.expected_outcome: A walkable path is opened with snow piled off to the side

tasks.task_goal: Measure and pour 2 cups of dry dog kibble into a feeding bowl
tasks.expected_outcome: Correct portion is delivered to the bowl without spilling

tasks.task_goal: Collect a small soil sample from a riverbank into a specimen bag
tasks.expected_outcome: A representative soil sample is obtained with minimal contamination

tasks.task_goal: Load ice from an ice bin into a cocktail shaker at a bar
tasks.expected_outcome: Shaker is filled with the required ice cubes without hand contact or spillage
